§6Chimney Blocks§f

§aBuild decorative chimney pipes to vent smoke from furnaces and fireplaces!§f
§bChimney Blocks§f are the core decorative and functional blocks of the §9Advanced Chimneys§f mod. They can be crafted from a wide variety of building materials, allowing them to match any base aesthetic.

§6Available Chimney Materials§f:
§b• Brick Chimney§f
§b• Cobblestone Chimney§f
§b• Concrete Chimney§f
§b• Glass Chimney§f (transparent)
§b• Terracotta Chimney§f
§b• Sandstone / Smooth Sandstone§f
§b• Red Nether Brick§f
§b• Polished Granite / Diorite / Andesite§f
§b• Nether Wart§f
§b• Magma§f
§b• Endstone Brick§f
§b• Dark Prismarine§f
§b• Coal§f

§6Key Features§f:
§b• Smoke Venting§f: Connect chimneys to furnaces, fireplaces, or other heat sources to create realistic smoke trails rising into the sky.
§b• Wind Interaction§f: Smoke particles collide with obstacles and react to wind.
§b• Repainting§f: Use a §9Paintbrush§f in one hand with a sample block in the other (plus water bucket + dyes) to repaint chimneys to any block texture.
§b• Custom Chimneys§f: You can create chimneys from virtually any block in the game.

§eTip§f: Chimneys work best when paired with §9Pollution of the Realms§f — smoke from industrial machines can contribute to environmental pollution.
